mapper.sql: conversation_id, seq, message_id, from_user_id, to_user_id, content, client_msg_id, created_at
mapper.insert: insert into im_private_message( conversation_id, seq, message_id, from_user_id, to_user_id, content, client_msg_id, created_at ) values ( #{conversationId}, #{seq}, #{messageId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{fromUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{toUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{content}, #{clientMsgId}, #{createdAt} )
